prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-SMKFPMTSBHPS-KPP-BUN1 Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: Speed Max Friction Power Monster Truck with Speed Boat Hauler Play Set Description: The Trail Master Friction Power Monster Truck Speed Boat Hauler belongs in every child's room. Combining the fun of a 9" friction propelled monster truck, and the cool factor of a 10" speed boat, this toy is a can't-miss gift.

The detachable trailer allows your child's creativity to run wild. Unhitch the trailer and start blazing trails with the large, realistic truck, or hook it back up and help your child learn the mechanics of hauling a trailer.

With awesome vehicle details and a durable construction, the Trail Master Friction Monster Truck Speed Boat Hauler is sure to be your child's new favorite toy.

Great for ages 3+ Search Terms: monster truck toy truck toy speed boat toy truck hauler gifts for boys Features: - Friction Powered Truck - Promotes Understanding of Basic Mechanics - Detachable Trailer with Speed Boat - Perfect Size 9" Truck 10" Boat - Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
